creator: developers.openai.com

evidence.text: When you’re iterating on a skill for an agent like Codex, it’s hard to tell whether you’re actually improving it or just changing its behavior. One version feels faster, another seems more reliable, and then a regression slips in: the skill doesn’t trigger, it skips a required step, or it leaves extra files behind.
